sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتْ هَنَاءُ وَرْدَةً حَمْرَاءَ عَلَى بَابِ غُرْفَتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Hana je pronašla crvenu ružu na vratima svoje sobe.
sentences.translationEn: Hana found a red rose on her bedroom door.

sentences.translation: Nije znala ko ju je tamo stavio.
sentences.translationEn: She did not know who had put it there.
She asked every member of her family.
They all said: It was not us.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ يَوْمٍ اعْتَرَفَتْ صَدِيقَتُهَا بِأَنَّهَا وَضَعَتِ الْوَرْدَةَ.
sentences.translation: Dan nakon toga njena prijateljica je priznala da je stavila ružu.
sentences.translationEn: A day later her friend admitted that she had put the rose.
